$comment: Pre-existing schema-index/constraint drift baseline for Task #237.
landed in shared/schema.ts BEFORE the index coverage check existed.
They are presumed to exist in production already (via drizzle-kit push
during early development, the ensure-critical-tables recovery path,
DO NOT add new entries here when introducing new indexes or
constraints. The whole point of the index coverage check is to force
you to add a real server/migrations/ensure-*.ts file with
CREATE [UNIQUE] INDEX IF NOT EXISTS <name> ON <table> (...)
instead of suppressing the warning here. Stale entries (gaps that
have since been covered by a real ensure-script) cause the check to
fail loudly so this list shrinks over time.
Format (kept here as documentation for the check parser):
